title: Authority for assessments to be made executory by the courts
doc_html:
§1729.  Authority for assessments to be made executory by the courts

Assessments being tantamount to and the equivalent of judgments may be made executory in any Louisiana court of competent jurisdiction.

Added by Acts 1972, No. 336, §1.
